fields.name: ADON
fields.description: A/D converter on. Note: writing ADON=1 when it is already 1 starts a conversion if EXTTRIG=0 and SWSTART is also set in the same write.

enumerated_values.1: Continuous conversion mode — converter restarts automatically after each conversion

fields.name: ALIGN
fields.description: Data alignment in the result register

fields.name: EXTTRIG
fields.description: External trigger conversion mode for regular channels

enumerated_values.0: Trigger detection disabled — conversion can only be started by software (SWSTART)
enumerated_values.1: Trigger detection enabled — conversion starts on the event selected by EXTSEL

fields.name: SWSTART
fields.description: Start conversion of regular channels. Set by software, cleared by hardware as soon as conversion starts.

enumerated_values.1: Starts conversion of regular channels when EXTTRIG=1 and EXTSEL selects this software event
